verses.text: Nitawp ni hun pen a lauhuai hun ahih ding lamtak phawk in
Tuahun ciangin mite in amau angsung ding bek ngaihsunin, huaihamin, kisialin, kihisakin, mi zahko-in, nu leh pate' thu mangloin, lungdam theihna mel neiloin, biakna lungsim neiloin
mi khualloin, hehpihna neiloin, mi gensia-in, ngongtatin, kihtakhuai-in, thuhoih deihloin
ciampelin, thu khualloin, kiphasak gawpin, Pasian donloin pumpi nopsakna bek deihin
biakna thu a puathamteng zui napi-in biakna hangin vangliatna thu a omte deihlo ding uh hi. Tua bangin a gamta mite na pelh in
Tua bang mite pawlkhat, mite inn-ah va hawh khiankhianin, deihna nam tuamtuam leh mawhna lungsim tawh a kidim numeite na thuzawh uh hi
Tua bang numeite in thu a zakzak uh hangin a man leh a manlo khen theilo uh ahih manin thuman thutak thei zolo uh hi
Jannes leh Jambres-te in Moses thu a nial mah bangin upna paizia a manlo hih thuhilh mite in zong thuman thutak a nial uh hi
Ahi zongin Jannes leh Jambres-te tungah a piangsa thu mah bangin mi khempeuh in amaute' haina mu ding uh ahih manin a nasepna uh sau tung khollo ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Timoti A Hanthot Tawpna

verses.text: Ahi zongin nangmah in ahih leh ka thuhilhna, ka gamtatna, leh ka nuntakna-ah ka ngim ka tup thute na hong zui hi. Ka upna, ka lungduaina, itna ka neihna, ka lungkipna

bawlsiatna ka thuakna, gimna ka thuakna, leh Antiok, Ikonium, leh Lystra khuate-ah kei tunga thupiang, nasia takin bawlsiatna ka thuaknate na theih na phawksa ahi hi. Ahi zongin Topa in hih haksatnate khempeuh panin kei hong suaktasak hi
Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin Pasian' deihna bangin a nungta nuam khempeuh in bawlsiatna a thuakding mah hi a
migilote leh thuthei kineihin mi khem theite zong sia tat semsemin, amaute in mi khemkhemin, amaute mah in zong khemna a thuakding mah uh ahi hi
Ahi zongin nang na hih leh na theihsa na upsa thute-ah kip paisuak in. Nang tungah thu hong hilhte kua mi ahi hiam cih na theihsa hi a
Khrih Jesuh upna hangin hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak thei ding pilna a hong pia Lai Siangtho pen na neutunga kipanin a theisa na hihna thu zong na theihsa thu mah ahi hi

Pasian' na a sem mite mi cingtaak hi-in, na hoih namkim a septheihna dingun Lai Siangtho pen Pasian' lamlahna tawh a hong kipia hi a, thuman thutak hilhna ding, a khialte taiina ding, a manlote a manin puahna ding, a manin nuntak theihna ding thuhilhna dingin a manpha mahmah ahi hi.
